name: GYD560 Gyro Updater
description: Update the firmware on the Futaba GYD560 drift counter-steer gyro over a CIU-2 / CIU-3 USB interface.
notes: The successor to the GYD550 and the only drift gyro with real Windows software. The download is a ZIP INSIDE A ZIP: the outer holds GYD560_Ver_2_0.zip plus the English update manual, and installer._unwrap_nested_zip flattens it so the updater lands at the tool dir root. Two updaters ship (Highspeed/Lowspeed) and both contain 'Update', which installer._find_exe's skip-list rejects - exe_relative_path must stay pinned or install fails with ExeNotFound. Requires a CIU-2 or CIU-3 interface (driver offered as a driver action; Windows usually installs the FTDI bridge itself). A transmitter-side update package also exists for T10PX/T10PXR/T10XCR/T6PV owners who have no CIU-3. Futaba's WordPress URL embeds both the upload month and the version, and WordPress appends '-1' on filename collisions, so version_check anchors on the software index page instead.
